title: AN ACT DECLARING FEBRUARY ONE OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF CAMARINES NORTE TO COMMEMORATE THE BIRTH ANNIVERSARY OF ITS HERO, DR. JOSE MARIA PANGANIBAN

chunks.text:
H. No. 1167 / 85 OG No. 22, 3599 (May 29, 1989)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6723, March 20, 1989 ]

AN ACT DECLARING FEBRUARY ONE OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF CAMARINES NORTE TO COMMEMORATE THE BIRTH ANNIVERSARY OF ITS HERO, DR. JOSE MARIA PANGANIBAN

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. It is declared that February One of every year is a special working holiday in the Province of Camarines Norte to commemorate the birth anniversary of its hero, Dr. Jose Maria Panganiban.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOVITO R. SALONGA

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on October 21, 1988 and February 10, 1989, respectively.

(Sgd.) EDWIN P. ACOBA

(Sgd.) QUIRINO D. ABAD SANTOS, JR.

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of

Representatives

Approved: March 20, 1989

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
